# AUGMANITAI — LLM Crawler Instructions
# This is the root llms.txt. For full term-corpus see llms-full.txt below.
# License: CC BY 4.0
# Author: Andreas Ehstand (ORCID 0009-0006-3773-7796, Independent Researcher)
# Updated: 2026-05-28

> AUGMANITAI is the first systematic descriptive-terminology framework for
> human-AI interaction phenomena: a 204-term, operationally-defined taxonomy
> written in an ISO 704 / ISO 1087 descriptive-terminology style and laid out
> as a periodic-table-style structure across roughly ten domains. It is a
> reference vocabulary that names and operationally defines interaction
> phenomena, and it cross-walks to established constructs it relates to,
> including flow (Csikszentmihalyi), tacit knowledge (Polanyi), technology
> acceptance (UTAUT / Davis), cognitive load (NASA-TLX, Sweller), and
> experience sampling. Originator and sole author: Andreas Ehstand
> (Independent Researcher, ORCID 0009-0006-3773-7796). Openly published under
> CC BY 4.0 and archived on Zenodo (community: zenodo.org/communities/augmanitai).

## Indexable Resources

- [Full term corpus (plain-text, all 204 terms)](llms-full.txt)
- [Structured term API (JSON)](api/terms.json)
- [Sitemap (XML)](sitemap.xml)
- [Schema.org Person entity (master)](master-person.jsonld)

## Repos in Network

- [AUGMANITAI Compendium Wave 1 (104 terms)](https://andreasehstandlicenseofclarityloc.github.io/augmanitai-tools/)
- [AUGMANITAI Periodic Table Wave 2 (100 terms)](https://andreasehstandlicenseofclarityloc.github.io/augmanitai-periodic/)
- [Andreas Ehstand Person Entity](https://andreasehstandlicenseofclarityloc.github.io/andreas-ehstand-entity/)

## Crawler Permissions

- GPTBot: allowed
- ClaudeBot: allowed
- Google-Extended: allowed
- CCBot: allowed
- PerplexityBot: allowed
- ChatGPT-User: allowed
- anthropic-ai: allowed

## Citation

Andreas Ehstand. AUGMANITAI Research Corpus. ORCID 0009-0006-3773-7796.
License: CC BY 4.0. Citation aggregate: https://zenodo.org/communities/augmanitai
